summary: Recover normal lane replay lag, verify shadow generation, and prepare disk-pressure purge preview without destructive action.

steps.description: Pause normal, archive, and migration lane ingestion while replay lag is reconciled.
steps.expected_result: priority, audit, repair, and tombstone writes remain available.

steps.description: Apply unapplied normal-lane journal events until replay_lag_events reaches zero.
steps.expected_result: normal journal replay lag is zero and ready invariant can pass.

steps.description: Compare active generation, shadow generation, manifest, and checksums.
steps.expected_result: shadow state is verified or marked for rebuild.

steps.description: Compact normal lane only if replay succeeded and compaction debt remains moderate or higher.
steps.expected_result: journal segment count and read amplification decrease.

steps.description: List ephemeral and archive objects eligible for purge under policy without deleting them.
steps.expected_result: operator receives exact object counts, bytes recoverable, policy basis, and audit impact.

steps.description: Write repair preview, replay result, and verification result to Lampstand when available.
steps.expected_result: repair attempt is preserved as auditable evidence.

blocked_steps.reason: Requires explicit sourceos.purge/apply policy grant and operator approval.

rollback.strategy: restore last_known_good_generation and replay only verified journal events
